datasets.name: pipeline_runs_30d
datasets.query:
SELECT
  DATE(end_time) AS run_date,
  COUNT(*) AS total_runs,
  SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'FAILED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS failed_runs,
  SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'COMPLETED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS successful_runs,
  ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'COMPLETED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 1) AS success_rate_pct
FROM system.lakeflow.pipeline_run_timeline
WHERE end_time >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL 30 DAYS
GROUP BY DATE(end_time)
ORDER BY run_date DESC

datasets.name: slow_queries
datasets.query:
SELECT
  user_name,
  ROUND(duration / 1000.0, 1) AS duration_sec,
  rows_produced,
  end_time,
  SUBSTR(query_text, 1, 120) AS query_preview
FROM system.query.history
WHERE end_time >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL 24 HOURS
  AND duration > 30000
  AND statement_type IN ('SELECT', 'INSERT', 'MERGE')
ORDER BY duration DESC
LIMIT 25

datasets.name: user_activity
datasets.query:
SELECT
  user_name,
  COUNT(*) AS query_count,
  ROUND(AVG(duration) / 1000.0, 1) AS avg_duration_sec,
  MAX(end_time) AS last_active
FROM system.query.history
WHERE end_time >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL 7 DAYS
GROUP BY user_name
ORDER BY query_count DESC
LIMIT 20

datasets.name: audit_access
datasets.query:
SELECT
  user_identity.email AS user_email,
  request_params.full_name_arg AS table_name,
  action_name,
  COUNT(*) AS access_count,
  MAX(event_time) AS last_accessed
FROM system.access.audit
WHERE service_name = 'unityCatalog'
  AND action_name IN ('getTable', 'selectFromTable', 'modifyTable')
  AND event_time >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL 7 DAYS
GROUP BY user_identity.email, request_params.full_name_arg, action_name
ORDER BY access_count DESC
LIMIT 30

datasets.name: query_volume_trend
datasets.query:
SELECT
  DATE(end_time) AS query_date,
  COUNT(*) AS total_queries,
  COUNT(DISTINCT user_name) AS distinct_users,
  ROUND(AVG(duration) / 1000.0, 1) AS avg_duration_sec
FROM system.query.history
WHERE end_time >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL 14 DAYS
GROUP BY DATE(end_time)
ORDER BY query_date

widget.name: header
widget.textbox_spec:
# Pipeline Health Monitor

Monitoring dashboard for the **example-lakeflow-pipeline** using Unity Catalog system tables.
Data source: `system.query.history`, `system.access.audit`, `system.lakeflow.pipeline_run_timeline`

widget.name: slow_queries_header
widget.textbox_spec:
## Slow Queries (>30s)

Queries taking more than 30 seconds in the last 24 hours. Use this to identify optimization opportunities.

widget.name: access_header
widget.textbox_spec:
## Access & Audit

User activity and table access patterns from `system.access.audit` and `system.query.history`.
